title: eriophorum × rousseauianum
intro: Eriophorum × rousseauianum, also known as the hybrid cotton-grass, is a plant species that is the result of the cross between Eriophorum angustifolium and Eriophorum vaginatum. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. Eriophorum × rousseauianum has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including gastrointestinal problems, wounds, and respiratory issues, offering benefits such as reduced inflammation, improved wound healing, and relief from coughs and colds. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and stems can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
